headline: Will Howmet's EBITDA Margin Continue to be Robust in 2026?
summary: HWM sustains margin expansion despite rising costs, with aerospace demand and pricing strength driving gains and guiding higher margins into 2026.

headline: 3 Reasons HWM Has Explosive Upside Potential
summary: Howmet currently trades at $248.39 and has been a dream stock for shareholders. It’s returned 663% since April 2021, blowing past the S&P 500’s 68.6% gain. The company has also beaten the index over the past six months as its stock price is up 31% thanks to its solid quarterly results.

headline: Aerospace Stock Is Poised To Climb Higher After 500% Run
summary: The stock has the highest Composite and EPS Ratings in IBD's aerospace and defense industry group. Shares are approaching a buy point, too.

headline: Why Boeing, GE Supplier Woodward Has Clear Skies Ahead
summary: Woodward's energy conversion and control systems help to power the Boeing 737 MAX, Joint Direct Attack Munitions and data centers — three of the engines key to fueling growth for the S&P 400 MidCap firm.  In addition to Boeing, customers accounting for at least 10% of sales for its aerospace or industrial segments in 2025 included RTX, GE Aerospace, GE Vernova, Caterpillar and Rolls-Royce.  Woodward is part of the flagship IBD 50 list of leading growth stocks.

headline: Assessing Howmet Aerospace’s (HWM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) is back on investors’ radar after its recent share move, with the stock showing mixed short term returns but positive performance over the past month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Howmet Aerospace. At a share price of $247.60, Howmet Aerospace has recently seen a 2.5% 1 day share price decline, but its 30 day share price return of 3.1% and year to date share price return of 17.0% sit alongside a very large 1 year total shareholder return, suggesting...
